name: llama-server-client

metadata.name: llama-server-client
metadata.summary: A ZMQ client interface for llama server

documentation: Llama Server Client is a Python package that provides a ZMQ client for interacting with a TCP Llama server that mimicsOpenAI's chat completion API.

classes.name: llama_server_client.error.LlamaClientError

methods.name: llama_server_client.error.LlamaClientError.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a new instance of the LlamaClientError.

Args:
    header (ZmqMessageHeader): The ZMQ message header associated with the error.
    additional_info (str, optional): Additional context about the error. Defaults to an empty string.

methods.name: llama_server_client.error.LlamaClientError._format_message
documentation:
Formats the error message with details from the header and any additional info.

Returns:
    str: The formatted error message.

Custom exception class for LlamaClient errors.

This exception class represents errors within the LlamaClient, including detailed
information from the ZmqMessageHeader for context.

Attributes:
    header (ZmqMessageHeader): The header of the ZMQ message associated with the error.
    additional_info (str): Additional context about the error.
    message_id (UUID): The ID of the ZMQ message.
    message_type (ZmqMessageType): The type of the ZMQ message.
    status (ZmqMessageStatus): The status of the ZMQ message.
    error_code (int): The error code associated with the ZMQ message.
    error_message (str): The error message associated with the ZMQ message.
    request_ts (datetime): The timestamp when the request was made.
    response_ts (datetime): The timestamp when the response was received.

classes.name: llama_server_client.base_client.BaseLlamaClient

methods.name: llama_server_client.base_client.BaseLlamaClient._initialize_context_and_socket
documentation:
Initializes the ZeroMQ context and creates a socket with the current timeout setting.
Calls the abstract methods _create_context and _create_socket for specific implementations.

methods.name: llama_server_client.base_client.BaseLlamaClient.close
documentation: Closes the socket and terminates the ZeroMQ context.

methods.name: llama_server_client.base_client.BaseLlamaClient.__del__
documentation: Destructor to ensure resources are freed when the instance is destroyed.

methods.name: llama_server_client.base_client.BaseLlamaClient._create_context
documentation:
Abstract method to create the ZeroMQ context.
Needs to be implemented in derived classes.

methods.name: llama_server_client.base_client.BaseLlamaClient._create_socket
documentation:
Abstract method to create the ZeroMQ socket.
Needs to be implemented in derived classes.

methods.name: llama_server_client.base_client.BaseLlamaClient._send_request
documentation:
Abstract method to send a request to the server.
This method needs to be implemented in derived classes.

BaseLlamaClient is an abstract base class for LlamaClient and AsyncLlamaClient.
It contains the common functionalities shared between both synchronous and asynchronous clients.

classes.name: llama_server_client.schema.split.Split
documentation: Dataclass representing a Split response.

classes.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._create_context
documentation: Create a new ZeroMQ context.

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._create_socket
documentation: Create a new ZeroMQ DEALER socket.

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._send_request
documentation:
Synchronously sends a request to the server, and waits for a response, handling timeouts.

```
param zmq_message_type

The type of the ZeroMQ message to be sent.

param request

The request object to be sent, if applicable.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

The unpacked response if successful, raw response if specified, or raises a timeout exception.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._stream_responses
documentation:
Handles streaming of responses.

```
param initial_resp_messages

The initial response messages received.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

An iterable yielding responses.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._handle_chat_completion_response
documentation:
Handles ChatCompletion responses.

```
param request

The ChatCompletionRequest to send.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

A ChatCompletion response or raw response if specified.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._handle_chat_completion_chunk_response
documentation:
Handles ChatCompletionChunk responses.

```
param request

The ChatCompletionRequest to send.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

An Iterable yielding ChatCompletionChunk responses or raw response if specified.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient.send_chat_completion_request
documentation:
Synchronously sends a ChatCompletionRequest to the server and waits for a ChatCompletion or
ChatCompletionChunk response.

```
param request

The ChatCompletionRequest to send.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

An Iterable yielding ChatCompletionChunk responses if request.stream is True,
a single ChatCompletion response if request.stream is False,
or a raw response if specified.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._handle_completion_response
documentation:
Handles Completion responses.

```
param request

The CompletionRequest to send.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

A ChatCompletion response or raw response if specified.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient._handle_completion_chunk_response
documentation:
Handles CompletionChunk responses.

```
param request

The CompletionRequest to send.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

An Iterable yielding ChatCompletionChunk responses or raw response if specified.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient.send_completion_request
documentation:
Synchronously sends a CompletionRequest to the server and waits for a ChatCompletion or
ChatCompletionChunk response. This legacy request is used for FIM

```
param request

The CompletionRequest to send.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

An Iterable yielding ChatCompletionChunk responses if request.stream is True,
a single ChatCompletion response if request.stream is False,
or a raw response if specified.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient.send_session_state_request
documentation:
Synchronously sends a SessionStateRequest to the server and waits for a SessionState response.

```
param request

The SessionStateRequest to send.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

A SessionState response, raw response if specified, or None if timed out.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.client.LlamaClient.send_health_check_request
documentation:
Synchronously sends a HealthCheck request to the server and waits for a HealthCheck response.

```
param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

A HealthCheck response, raw response if specified, or None if timed out.
```

LlamaClient is a synchronous client class for communication with a server using ZeroMQ.
It handles socket creation, sending requests, and receiving responses with an option for timeouts.

classes.name: llama_server_client.async_client.AsyncLlamaClient

methods.name: llama_server_client.async_client.AsyncLlamaClient._create_context
documentation: Create a new ZeroMQ async context.

methods.name: llama_server_client.async_client.AsyncLlamaClient._create_socket
documentation: Create a new ZeroMQ DEALER socket.

methods.name: llama_server_client.async_client.AsyncLlamaClient._send_request
documentation:
Asynchronously sends a request to the server, and waits for a response, handling timeouts.

```
param zmq_message_type

The type of the ZeroMQ message to be sent.

param request

The request object to be sent, if applicable.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

The unpacked response if successful, or raises a timeout exception. Returns raw response if specified.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.async_client.AsyncLlamaClient._stream_responses
documentation:
Handles streaming of responses.

```
param initial_resp_messages

The initial response messages received.

param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

An async iterable yielding responses.
```

Asynchronously sends a ChatCompletionRequest to the server and waits for a ChatCompletion or
ChatCompletionChunk response.

```

or a raw response if specified.
```

documentation:
Asynchronously sends a CompletionRequest to the server and waits for a ChatCompletion or
ChatCompletionChunk response. This legacy request is used for FIM

```
param request
```

documentation:
Asynchronously sends a HealthCheck request to the server and waits for a HealthCheck response.

```
param raw_response

Flag to determine if raw response should be returned.

return

A HealthCheck response, raw response if specified, or None if timed out.
```

AsyncLlamaClient is an asynchronous client class for communication with a server using ZeroMQ with asyncio.
It handles socket creation, sending requests, and receiving responses with an option for timeouts.

functions.name: llama_server_client.schema.zmq_message_header.create_message_header
documentation:
Creates and returns a new ZmqMessageHeader with a unique ID and the current timestamp.

```
param message_type

The type of the ZeroMQ message.

return

An instance of ZmqMessageHeader with the specified message type and other default values.
```

classes.name: llama_server_client.schema.zmq_message_header.ZmqMessageType
documentation:
ZmqMessageType defines the types of messages used in a ZeroMQ messaging system.
Each type is associated with a specific class for handling its data.

classes.name: llama_server_client.schema.zmq_message_header.ZmqMessageStatus
documentation:
ZmqMessageStatus is an enumeration representing the status of a ZeroMQ message.
It indicates whether a message was processed successfully or encountered an error.

classes.name: llama_server_client.schema.zmq_message_header.ZmqMessageHeader

methods.name: llama_server_client.schema.zmq_message_header.ZmqMessageHeader.decode_map
documentation:
Provides a mapping for decoding the fields of a ZmqMessageHeader.

```
return

A dictionary where keys are field names and values are their corresponding data types.
```

ZmqMessageHeader represents the header information of a ZeroMQ message.
It contains essential data like message ID, type, status, and timestamps.

functions.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.encoder_default
documentation:
Custom encoder for serializing objects to be used with msgpack.

```
param obj

The object to be serialized. :return: A serialized representation of the object, converting UUIDs to
```

bytes, datetimes to timestamps, and Enums to their values.

functions.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.decode_with_map
documentation:
Decodes an object using a provided mapping of keys to functions, facilitating custom deserialization.

```
param obj

The object to be decoded.

param decode_map

A dictionary mapping attribute names to their decoding functions.

return

The decoded object with its attributes transformed as per the decode map.
```

functions.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.json_serializer
documentation:
Custom serializer for JSON, specifically handling UUIDs, datetimes, and Enums.

```
param obj

The object to be serialized. :return: A JSON-friendly representation of the object, converting UUIDs
```

to strings, datetimes to ISO format, and Enums to their names.

classes.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.Base

methods.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.Base.msgpack_pack
documentation:
Serializes the object to MessagePack format.

```
return

The object serialized in MessagePack format as bytes, or None if serialization fails.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.Base.to_json_str
documentation:
Converts the object to a JSON string, optionally excluding fields with null values.

```
param indent

The number of spaces for indentation.

param exclude_none

Whether to exclude fields with null values. Default is True.

return

The object serialized as a JSON string with indentation for readability.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.Base.decode_map
documentation:
Provides a mapping for decoding the fields of an object.

```
return

A dictionary where keys are field names and values are their corresponding data types or decoding
```

functions.

methods.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.Base.decode_default
documentation:
Decodes a dictionary into an object of class T using the class's decode map.

```
param data

The dictionary to decode.

return

An instance of class T created from the decoded data, or None if decoding fails.
```

methods.name: llama_server_client.schema.base.Base.msgpack_unpack
documentation:
Unpacks MessagePack data into an object of class T.

```
param data

The MessagePack data to unpack.

return

An instance of class T created from the unpacked data, or None if unpacking fails.
```

Base is an abstract data class providing serialization and deserialization methods for MessagePack and JSON.

It offers a standard approach to pack and unpack data across different data classes.
